billing.freeBlurb: You're on the Free plan. Upgrade to Pro to unlock unlimited discovery, content, and outreach.
billing.proBlurb: You're on Pro. Thanks for your support!
billing.upgradeDescription: Unlock unlimited lead discovery, AI content, and outreach.

metadata.title: ScoreLead - AI B2B Lead Discovery & Scoring
metadata.description: Find, score, and convert B2B company leads with AI. Automated account discovery, intelligent scoring, and personalized outreach at scale.

hero.heading: Discover, score, and convert your next best B2B customers
hero.subtitle: ScoreLead uses AI to find and qualify companies, enrich them with account data, score their revenue potential, and generate personalized B2B outreach automatically.
hero.demoDisclosure: Product preview with illustrative company and contact data.

customerStory.label: Customer story
customerStory.heading: See how Ceramik reported 10x pipeline growth
customerStory.quote: ScoreLead transformed how we find and reach pottery studios. We went from manually searching for leads to discovering hundreds of qualified prospects in minutes. Our pipeline grew 10x in the first month.
customerStory.companyDesc: All-in-one app for pottery teachers to manage their studios
customerStory.statsLabel: Customer-reported results after 30 days with ScoreLead
customerStory.stat2Label: Pipeline growth in the first month
customerStory.stat3Label: Less time spent on manual research

features.heading: Built for B2B teams that need more pipeline
features.description: ScoreLead combines company discovery, account enrichment, and B2B outreach into one system. Stop juggling spreadsheets and manual research - let AI handle the heavy lifting.
features.outreachPreview1: Hi, I noticed your studio offers yoga and pilates...
features.outreachPreview2: Teams can reduce repetitive research before outreach...
features.outreachPreview3: With your 4.7 rating and growing demand...

ai.label: Artificial intelligence
ai.heading: AI that does the research for you
ai.description: ScoreLead AI. Point it at any market, region, or account profile, and it discovers companies, visits their websites, extracts structured data - emails, pricing, services, team members, social profiles - and scores every B2B lead automatically.
ai.scoringDesc: Our AI analyzes every lead across multiple dimensions - online presence, reputation, market fit, engagement potential, and readiness to buy - then distills it into one clear score.
ai.outreachDesc: AI generates personalized multi-step outreach sequences in multiple languages. Each message references the lead's specific business details.
ai.outreachStep1Subject: Loved what I saw at Sunset Yoga Studio
ai.outreachStep1Body: Hi, I noticed your studio offers yoga, pilates, and meditation classes in SF...
ai.outreachStep2Body: I wanted to share how teams can reduce repetitive lead research before outreach...
ai.outreachStep3Subject: Your 128 five-star reviews say it all
ai.outreachStep3Body: With your 4.7 rating and growing waitlist, here's how we can help scale...
ai.subject: Subject:
ai.demoDisclosure: Illustrative product demo. Company, contact, score, and message details are sample data.

pipeline.label: Workflow and pipeline
pipeline.heading: From discovery to conversion
pipeline.description: Visualize your entire B2B pipeline. Track every company lead from first discovery through enrichment, scoring, outreach, and conversion - all in one place.
pipeline.discoveryDesc: Launch async discovery jobs by country, state, or city. Track progress in real time as ScoreLead scans multiple data sources across the web.
pipeline.deduplicationDesc: Smart identity matching ensures no duplicate leads. Our AI cross-references multiple data points to merge duplicates automatically.
pipeline.feature1Desc: Async discovery by geography with progress tracking.
pipeline.feature2Desc: Intelligent scoring across multiple dimensions to prioritize the best leads.
pipeline.feature3Desc: Export filtered leads with all enriched data.
pipeline.feature4Desc: AI outreach in multiple languages to reach leads anywhere in the world.
pipeline.demoDisclosure: Illustrative workflow. Stage totals are sample data, not customer results.

dashboard.discoveryJobsDesc: Launch discovery jobs to find leads by location. Our AI scans the web, scores prospects, and delivers qualified leads to your inbox.
dashboard.jobNamePlaceholder: e.g. Yoga studios in San Francisco
dashboard.noJobsDesc: Create your first job to start finding leads automatically.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account, preferences, and security.
settings.emailHint: Email cannot be changed yet. Contact support if you need to update it.
settings.languageDescription: Changes apply across the app immediately.
settings.themeDescription: How the interface looks on this device.
settings.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
settings.activeSessionsDescription: Devices currently signed in to your account.
settings.signOutEverywhere: Sign out of all other devices
settings.freePlanDescription: You are on the free plan. Upgrade options are coming soon.
settings.leadAlertsDescription: Notify me when new high-score leads are discovered.
settings.weeklyDigestDescription: Send a summary of my pipeline every Monday.
settings.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountConfirmDescription: This action is permanent. Type your email to confirm.
settings.supportDescription: Need a hand? Send us a message and we'll get back to you.
settings.supportMessagePlaceholder: Describe your issue or question in detail...
settings.supportSent: Message sent - we'll be in touch soon.
settings.supportFailed: Could not send your message. Try again or email us directly.
settings.supportResponseBody: We usually reply within one business day.

business.title: Business
business.noBrandHint: Rerun onboarding with your website to extract colors, fonts, and style.
business.editBusinessHint: Update your profile - fields below feed the AI when generating content.
business.uploadFailed: Could not upload image. Please try again.
business.editColorsHint: Brand colors are edited directly on the Brand section above.
business.refreshNeedsWebsite: Add a website URL to this business before refreshing the brand.
business.productImagesHint: Upload up to 6 photos or screenshots of your product. AI uses them as references when generating post images.
business.productImageDescribeNudge: Add a description so AI knows when to use it

outreach.title: Outreach messages
outreach.emptyDescription: Generate outreach messages with AI, tailored to this lead based on what we know about them.
outreach.subject: Subject

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Connect this business to the official WhatsApp Business Platform and control consent-based outreach.
whatsapp.comingSoonPageDescription: Preview the safeguards being prepared for official WhatsApp Business outreach.
whatsapp.comingSoonTitle: WhatsApp automation is on the way
whatsapp.comingSoonDescription: We’re finishing the connection and compliance experience before opening it to customers. Meta connection is unavailable until this guardrail is lifted.
whatsapp.loadError: Could not load the WhatsApp integration
whatsapp.connectDescription: Meta Embedded Signup securely connects an eligible WhatsApp Business App or a new Business Platform number. ScoreLead never receives your WhatsApp password.
whatsapp.signupCancelled: Meta signup was cancelled or incomplete
whatsapp.sdkLoading: Meta signup is still loading. Try again in a moment.
whatsapp.consentDescription: Only leads with recorded WhatsApp marketing opt-in can be scheduled.
whatsapp.templatesDescription: Automated steps use approved Marketing templates with reviewed variables.
whatsapp.guardrailsDescription: Daily limits and local sending windows are checked again before every send.
whatsapp.disconnectDescription: Pending sequences will be cancelled and the stored business token will be destroyed.
whatsapp.sendingSettingsDescription: These business-level rules apply to every approved sequence.
whatsapp.templateHelp: Only approved Marketing templates with supported formatting can be sent in automated outreach - Utility templates and ones with unsupported buttons or media still count as approved.
whatsapp.automationDescription: Consent-gated delivery through your connected business number.
whatsapp.proRequired: Automated sending is available on Pro. The manual WhatsApp button above remains available.
whatsapp.connectionRequired: Connect this business to WhatsApp before scheduling messages.
whatsapp.consentAttestation: I confirm this recipient gave this business permission to receive WhatsApp marketing messages.
whatsapp.noTemplates: No supported approved Marketing templates are synced yet.
whatsapp.selectTemplatesError: Choose a template for all three steps
whatsapp.previewError: Could not create the WhatsApp preview
whatsapp.templatesManagerDescription: Create templates, submit them to Meta for approval, and manage the ones you already have.
whatsapp.tplFormHint: Meta reviews every template. Approval usually takes a few minutes to a day.
whatsapp.tplHeaderPlaceholder: Short title shown above the message
whatsapp.tplBodyPlaceholder: Hi '{{1}}', your order '{{2}}' is on its way!
whatsapp.tplBodyHint: Use numbered variables like '{{1}}', '{{2}}' for personalized values.
whatsapp.tplDeleteBody: "{name}" will be permanently removed from WhatsApp. This can't be undone.
whatsapp.tplEmptyBody: Create your first template and submit it to Meta for approval.
whatsapp.tplEditPendingBlocked: Templates under review can't be edited yet
whatsapp.sendNowDescription: Send one approved template now. It respects your send window and daily limit.
whatsapp.sendNowConfirmBody: Send "{template}" to {phone}? It will go out within your send window and daily limit.
whatsapp.sendNowQueued: Message queued - it'll send within your send window and daily limit.

waitlist.heading: Want to see ScoreLead in action?
waitlist.description: Leave your email and our team will reach out to show you how ScoreLead can help your business find better leads.
waitlist.success: Thanks! Our team will get back to you shortly.
waitlist.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.tagline: Turn target markets into qualified, ready-to-contact B2B opportunities.

contact.title: Let’s start a conversation.
contact.description: Tell us what you need and we’ll get your message to the right person.
contact.responseTime: We usually reply within one business day.
contact.salesDescription: See how ScoreLead fits your market, workflow, and pipeline goals.
contact.supportDescription: Get help with your account, setup, or an issue inside the product.
contact.partnershipDescription: Explore integrations, referrals, content, and other ways to work together.
contact.formDescription: Share the details we need to help.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messagePlaceholder: Share the details that will help us understand what you need...
contact.privacy: We’ll only use these details to respond to your message.
contact.sendError: We couldn’t send your message. Please try again or email hello@scorelead.io.
contact.rateLimited: Too many messages were sent from this connection. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
contact.successTitle: Thanks. It’s with the right team.
contact.successDescription: We’ve received your message and will get back to you as soon as we can—usually within one business day.

validation.nameTooLong: Name must be 100 characters or fewer.
validation.companyTooLong: Company must be 120 characters or fewer.
validation.subjectTooShort: Subject must be at least 3 characters.
validation.subjectTooLong: Subject must be 160 characters or fewer.
validation.messageTooShort: Add a little more detail—at least 20 characters.
validation.messageTooLong: Message must be 5,000 characters or fewer.

capabilities.label: Capabilities
capabilities.heading: Everything you need in one platform
capabilities.description: ScoreLead combines AI-powered discovery, enrichment, scoring, outreach, and export into a single platform - so your team can focus on closing deals.
capabilities.card1Title: Find businesses across any city or industry automatically
capabilities.card2Title: Search and index business websites at scale
capabilities.card3Title: Extract structured data from any business website
capabilities.card4Title: Turn raw data into actionable lead intelligence
capabilities.card5Title: Export enriched leads to CSV with all data points
capabilities.card7Title: Build custom integrations with the ScoreLead API

auth.resetPasswordDoneDesc: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.
auth.resetPasswordInvalidDesc: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one to continue.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Let's set up your business profile so our AI can start finding B2B company leads for you.
onboarding.primaryLinksDescription: Start with your website and Instagram - these help our AI understand your business best.
onboarding.moreLinksDescription: Add more social profiles so we can build a complete picture of your brand.
onboarding.linksDescription: Add your online presence and we'll use AI to build your business profile automatically.
onboarding.locationDescription: This helps us find B2B companies in your target area and tailor our AI recommendations.
onboarding.skipToManual: I don't have links - fill in manually
onboarding.processingDescription: This usually takes a few seconds...
onboarding.reviewDescription2: Check the information below and make any changes you need.

onboarding.reviewClientPersonaPlaceholder: Which companies are your best-fit customers?
onboarding.targetingDescription: Help us understand which companies you sell to so we can find the best B2B leads.
onboarding.targetB2BDesc: You sell to companies and business buyers
onboarding.targetB2CDesc: Consumer lead generation is coming soon
onboarding.targetBothDesc: Mixed B2B/B2C targeting is coming soon
onboarding.targetServicesHint: Press Enter to add each service. Be specific.

onboarding.targetCompetitorsHint: Add the website URL of businesses similar to yours.
onboarding.errorTagsRequired: At least one tag is required

contentCalendar.title: Content Calendar
contentCalendar.subtitle: Plan a month of Instagram content tuned to your brand.
contentCalendar.genBody: We're reading your brand and planning a month of posts tuned to your category, audience, and voice.
contentCalendar.caption: Caption
contentCalendar.captionHint: First line is the hook - keep it under 80 characters.
contentCalendar.visualIdeaHint: Describe what the image or video should show. Reference brand colors for cohesion.
contentCalendar.imageHint: Images are rendered with Nano Banana Pro using your brand colors and fonts.
contentCalendar.imageFailed: Image generation failed. Try again in a moment.
contentCalendar.refinePlaceholder: e.g. Warmer lighting. Zoom out a bit. Replace the ceramic bowl with a linen fabric. Keep everything else.
contentCalendar.slidesFailedHint: Tap the red dot to redo that slide.
contentCalendar.draftsAdded: {count} drafts added - tap any post to refine.
contentCalendar.emptyTitle: Plan your month in one click
contentCalendar.emptyBody: We'll draft a full month of Instagram posts from your business profile - mixing Reels, carousels, and value content tuned to your category, audience, and brand voice.
contentCalendar.hookTooLong: Trim the hook - aim for under 80 chars
contentCalendar.onboardingRequired: Complete onboarding first to generate content.
contentCalendar.imageAfterSaveHint: Save the post first, then generate its image here.
contentCalendar.referenceImageHint: Which product photo AI should reference for this post's image.
contentCalendar.previewImageEmpty: Generate an image to see it here
contentCalendar.previewCaptionEmpty: Write a caption to see it here
